suite.name: Appium Validation

kw.name: Setup Appium Validation
Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup Appium validation environment

test.name: APPIUM_001_Validate Appium Installation

kw.name: Setup Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup for individual validation tests

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup after validation tests

test.doc: Test that Appium is properly installed and accessible

test.name: APPIUM_002_Validate Appium Server Startup

kw.name: Setup Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup for individual validation tests

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.msg:
'{"value":{"error":"unknown command","message":"The requested resource could not be found, or a request was received using an HTTP method that is not supported by the mapped resource.","stacktrace":"UnknownCommandError: The requested resource could not be found, or a request was received using an HTTP method that is not supported by the mapped resource.
 at catch404Handler (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/lib/express/middleware.js:139:49)
 at Layer.handleRequest (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/lib/layer.js:152:17)
 at next (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/lib/route.js:157:13)
 at Route.dispatch (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/lib/route.js:117:3)
 at handle (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:435:11)
 at Layer.handleRequest (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/lib/layer.js:152:17)
 at /Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:295:15
 at param (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:600:14)
 at param (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:610:14)
 at processParams (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:664:3)
 at next (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:291:5)
 at logger (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/morgan/index.js:144:5)
 at Layer.handleRequest (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/lib/layer.js:152:17)
 at trimPrefix (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:342:13)
 at /Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:297:9
 at processParams (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:582:12)
 at next (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:291:5)
 at jsonParser (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/body-parser/lib/types/json.js:100:7)
 at Layer.handleRequest (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/lib/layer.js:152:17)
 at trimPrefix (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:342:13)
 at /Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:297:9
 at processParams (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/router/index.js:582:12)"}}' does not contain '"ready"'
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
kw.status:
'{"value":{"error":"unknown command","message":"The requested resource could not be found, or a request was received using an HTTP method that is not supported by the mapped resource.","stacktrace":"UnknownCommandError: The requested resource could not be found, or a request was received using an HTTP method that is not supported by the mapped resource.
 at catch404Handler (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/lib/express/middleware.js:139:49)

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Terminate Process
kw.doc: Stops the process gracefully or forcefully.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Appium server started and stopped successfully
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup after validation tests

test.doc: Test that Appium server can start successfully
test.status:
'{"value":{"error":"unknown command","message":"The requested resource could not be found, or a request was received using an HTTP method that is not supported by the mapped resource.","stacktrace":"UnknownCommandError: The requested resource could not be found, or a request was received using an HTTP method that is not supported by the mapped resource.
 at catch404Handler (/Users/vanvo/npm-global/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/lib/express/middleware.js:139:49)

test.name: APPIUM_003_Validate MobileUtils Library

kw.name: Setup Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup for individual validation tests

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Import Library
kw.doc: Imports a library with the given name and optional arguments.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup after validation tests

test.doc: Test that MobileUtils library loads correctly

test.name: APPIUM_004_Validate Appium Configuration

kw.name: Setup Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup for individual validation tests

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Get File Size
kw.doc: Returns and logs file size as an integer in bytes.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Appium configuration file is valid (size: 2679 bytes)
kw.arg: Appium configuration file is valid (size: ${config_size} bytes)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup after validation tests

test.doc: Test that Appium configuration files are valid

test.name: APPIUM_005_Validate UiAutomator2 Driver

kw.name: Setup Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup for individual validation tests

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup after validation tests

test.doc: Test that UiAutomator2 driver is installed

test.name: APPIUM_006_Validate Mobile Test Files

kw.name: Setup Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup for individual validation tests

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Grep File
kw.doc: Returns the lines of the specified file that match the ``pattern``.

kw.name: Grep File
kw.doc: Returns the lines of the specified file that match the ``pattern``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup after validation tests

test.doc: Test that mobile test files are properly structured

test.name: APPIUM_007_Validate Environment Variables

kw.name: Setup Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup for individual validation tests

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Environment Variable Should Be Set
kw.msg: Environment variable 'PATH' is set to '/Users/vanvo/.pyenv/versions/3.9.19/bin:/opt/homebrew/Cellar/pyenv/2.6.3/libexec:/opt/homebrew/Cellar/pyenv/2.6.3/plugins/python-build/bin:/Users/vanvo/npm-global/bin:/Users/vanvo/npm-global/bin:/Users/vanvo/npm-global/bin:/Users/vanvo/npm-global/bin:/Users/vanvo/.pyenv/shims:/Users/vanvo/.pyenv/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/System/Cryptexes/App/usr/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/local/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/appleinternal/bin:/Users/vanvo/.pyenv/bin:/Users/vanvo/Library/Application Support/JetBrains/Toolbox/scripts'.
kw.doc: Fails if the specified environment variable is not set.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup after validation tests

test.doc: Test environment variables for mobile testing

test.name: APPIUM_008_Validate Mobile Test Capabilities

kw.name: Setup Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Setup for individual validation tests

kw.name: Get File
kw.msg:
${appium_config} = # Appium Configuration for Mobile Testing # SDET Technical Exercise - Mobile Automation
# Appium Server Configuration appium: server: host: "127.0.0.1" port: 4723 log_level: "info" ...
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Mobile test capabilities are properly configured
kw.arg: Mobile test capabilities are properly configured
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Teardown Validation
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup after validation tests

test.doc: Test that mobile test capabilities are properly configured

kw.name: Teardown Appium Validation
Run Keyword And Return Status
Process Should Be Running
kw.doc: Verifies that the process is running.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Terminate All Processes
kw.doc: Terminates all still running processes started by this library.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Cleanup Appium validation environment

suite.doc: Appium Setup Validation Tests Validates that Appium is properly configured and ready for mobile testing
